channel.title: Frontity in Cpanel
channel.description: When we build our Frontity App and upload it to Cpanel then how we can make changes in App script? Does we have to update the script in local rebuild and upload again?

item.title: Frontity in Cpanel
item.dc:creator: help.highaddons
item.description:
When we build our Frontity App and upload it to Cpanel then how we can make changes in App script?
Does we have to update the script in local rebuild and upload again?

Read full topic
